writing.title: Writing Task 1: Describe your house
writing.prompt: Write a short paragraph (about 40 words) describing your house using there is/are.
writing.sampleAnswer: There is a small garden in front of my house. There are three bedrooms and one bathroom. There is also a kitchen next to the living room.
checklist: Dùng there is/are ít nhất 3 lần
Mô tả ít nhất 3 phòng/khu vực
Câu văn đúng ngữ pháp số ít/số nhiều

writing.title: Writing Task 1: What's missing in the room?
writing.prompt: Write a short paragraph (about 40 words) describing what is and isn't in a room, using there isn't/aren't.
writing.sampleAnswer: There isn't a sofa in my new room yet, but there is a bed and a desk. There aren't any shelves, so my books are on the floor.
checklist: Dùng there isn't/aren't ít nhất 1 lần
Dùng there is/are cho phần có sẵn
Diễn đạt rõ vật gì thiếu, vật gì có
